title: cleomella californica
intro: Cleomella californica, also known as California wolf's clover or California bee plant, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues such as diarrhea and stomach cramps, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cleomella californica include soothing irritated digestive tracts, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural antiseptic to promote wound healing. Cleomella californica is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, syrups, or applied topically as creams or salves.
